description: Contoso Logistics needs an event-driven pipeline for globally distributed vehicle and facility IoT telemetry. Devices publish through Azure IoT Hub; telemetry is normalized and enriched in stream processing (Event Hubs + stream processing tier), persisted to warm storage (Cosmos DB or SQL patterns TBD per workload), aggregated to Azure Data Explorer for fleet analytics, and surfaced in near-real-time Grafana-backed dashboards with alerting. Privacy: geolocation telemetry is minimized and retained per contractual retention tiers.
constraints: Ingestion must tolerate intermittent device connectivity without duplicate command side-effects (idempotent device commands).
PII-bearing telemetry identifiers must map to pseudonymous device ids in analytics stores.
Regional data residency preference: EU fleet data stays in EU Azure regions.
Alert noise must stay below an agreed weekly budget (false-positive cap).
requiredCapabilities: Millions ofIngress events per hour with partitioned scaling
Replay from raw landing zone when downstream processors need backfill
Role-based access to analytics aligned to Ops vs Data Science personas
assumptions: Devices are provisioned via DPS or equivalent with device twin desired properties used sparingly.
Downstream ML scoring is asynchronous and not on the ingestion hot path.
inlineRequirements: REQ: Ingest pipeline exposes lag and watermark metrics per regional consumer group.
REQ: Cold path supports GDPR-style purge requests keyed by pseudonymous device lineage.
REQ: Incident response runbook linkage from critical alerts into Teams or equivalent channel.
TOP: Dedicated Event Hub namespaces partitioned by ingestion volume and blast-radius isolation.
SEC: Network rules restrict ingestion endpoints to approved IP/device patterns.
securityBaselineHints: Conditional access policies for Ops consoles accessing telemetry stores
Private endpoints by default between processing tiers and persisted stores
Immutable audit logs for telemetry schema evolution and ingestion configuration changes
